name: Neck Rolls
instructions: Slowly roll your head in a circle. 5 times clockwise, then 5 times counter-clockwise. Keep shoulders relaxed.

name: Chin Tucks
instructions: Pull your chin straight back, creating a double chin. Hold for 5 seconds. Repeat 5 times.

name: Neck Side Stretch
instructions: Tilt your head toward your right shoulder. Hold 15 seconds. Repeat on the left side.

name: Deep Neck Rotation
instructions: Slowly turn your head to look over your right shoulder. Hold 10 seconds. Repeat left.

name: Neck Flexion Stretch
instructions: Gently bring your chin to your chest. Place hands behind your head for gentle pressure. Hold 20 seconds.

name: Levator Scapulae Stretch
instructions: Look down toward your right armpit. Use your hand to gently pull. Hold 20 seconds each side.

name: Seated Cat-Cow
instructions: Sit upright. Arch your back (cow), then round it (cat). Move slowly between positions 10 times.

name: Seated Spinal Twist
instructions: Sit tall, twist your torso to the right. Hold the back of the chair. Hold 15 seconds each side.

name: Seated Forward Fold
instructions: Sit at the edge of your chair. Fold forward, letting your arms hang. Hold for 20 seconds.

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions: Stand up, step one foot forward into a lunge. Push hips forward gently. Hold 20 seconds each side.

name: Figure Four Stretch
instructions: Sit and cross your right ankle over left knee. Lean forward gently. Hold 20 seconds each side.

name: Standing Back Extension
instructions: Stand up. Place hands on your lower back and gently arch backward. Hold 10 seconds. Repeat 3 times.

name: Shoulder Rolls
instructions: Roll your shoulders forward 10 times, then backward 10 times. Keep movements smooth and controlled.

name: Cross-Body Stretch
instructions: Bring your right arm across your chest. Use your left hand to pull gently. Hold 15 seconds each side.

name: Overhead Reach
instructions: Interlace fingers, push palms to ceiling. Stretch upward and hold for 15 seconds.

name: Doorway Chest Stretch
instructions: Stand in a doorway, arms on frame at 90 degrees. Step forward gently. Hold 20 seconds.

name: Eagle Arms
instructions: Cross right elbow over left, wrap forearms. Lift elbows to shoulder height. Hold 15 seconds each side.

name: Shoulder Shrugs
instructions: Raise both shoulders toward your ears. Hold 5 seconds, then release. Repeat 10 times.

name: Wrist Circles
instructions: Extend your arms. Make circles with your wrists. 10 times each direction.

name: Prayer Stretch
instructions: Press palms together in front of chest. Lower hands until you feel the stretch. Hold 15 seconds.

name: Wrist Flexor Stretch
instructions: Extend your right arm, palm up. Use left hand to pull fingers down. Hold 15 seconds each side.

name: Finger Spread
instructions: Spread your fingers wide, hold 5 seconds, then make a fist. Repeat 10 times.

name: Thumb Stretch
instructions: Wrap your fingers around your thumb. Gently bend your wrist toward pinky. Hold 15 seconds each hand.

name: Wrist Extensor Stretch
instructions: Extend your arm, palm down. Use other hand to press fingers toward you. Hold 15 seconds each side.
